title: Hormel is recalling 161,692 pounds of Skippy peanut butter
text: Hormel Foods is recalling thousands of pounds of Skippy peanut butter because of stainless steel fragments possibly contaminating "a limited number of jars."

title: Jennie-O Shares National Survey Results Revealing How Americans Are Combatting Recipe Boredom & Cooking Fatigue
text: Survey shows where home cooks find inspiration and solutions WILLMAR, Minn., March 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jennie-O Turkey Store, one of the most beloved turkey brands in the world, today announced the results of its latest national survey showing how Americans feel about cooking at home, recipe boredom during the last couple years, and compelling and unusual ways people are finding inspiration in the kitchen.

title: Goldman Sachs Turns Bearish On This Food Processing Company

title: Hormel Foods (HRL) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Hormel (HRL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.33% and 5.85%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Hormel stock gains after revenue rises above forecasts and full-year outlook affirmed
text: Shares of Hormel Foods Corp. HRL, -1.69% rose 0.8% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the foods company, which brands include Planters, SPAM, Skippy and Hormel, reported fiscal first-quarter profit that matched expectations but revenue that rose above forecasts, with strongest growth in grocery products. Net income for the quarter to Jan. 30 rose to $239.6 million, or 44 cents a share, from $222.3 million, or 41 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: HORMEL FOODS REPORTS RECORD FIRST QUARTER SALES AND REAFFIRMS FULL YEAR SALES AND EARNINGS GUIDANCE
text: AUSTIN, Minn., March 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a leading global branded food company, today reported results for the first quarter of fiscal 2022.
